titleStmt.title: SII 17.605: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 605. (A.R. No. 560 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This epigraph commences with the praśasti, Pūmālai miḍaindu etc., of Vikramachōḷa.

It records the gift of a piece of land, called Kaṟpūrakkuḍukkai, on the northern banks of Kaḍuvāy alias Rājanārāyaṇa-ppērāṟu after making it tax-free to god Śrīmūlasthānamuḍaiyār of Tiruvārūr, by the Peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhai of Pulivalam, brahmadēya in Puliyūr-nāḍu in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu, when it was assembled at Rajēndraśōḻa-atti (for attāṉi).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai miṭainta parumaṇittiraḷ puyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppa kanavaraimārvan tanatenap peṟṟu tirumakaḷo ru taniyiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarntakaṟpinaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvaka ttiruppa ticaitoṟum tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvanamuṅ kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai melmicai niṟppa karuṅkali Oḷittu va
ṉpilattiṭaik kiṭappa teliṅka(l) viman vilaṅka micaiyeṟa kaliṅka maṇṭalaṅ kanaleri parappi veṅkai maṇṭalaṅ kaṭantu tāṅkalar kaliṅkameḻum kanaleri parappi Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki vaṭaticai Aṭippaṭuttaruḷi tenṟicaittarumamum tavamum tānamum taḻaippa vetamum meymmaiyum Ātiyukampol talaittalai ciṟappa van=taruḷi vilaṟkarum puliyāṇaipāttivar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyi
l maṇimuṭi cūṭi mannuyiṟkellā ninnuyirpola tannoḷi tankoyil koṟṟavācal maṇināvoṭuṅka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum mel meloṅki ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaruciṅkaṇar Añci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kanniṭar venniṭa koṅkar Otuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟum Etticaippaṭṭa mannarum tan=tamak karaṇena cempoṟ cevaṭi mimicai yiṟaiñ
ci tollai Eḻum toḻuteḻa tonṟi mullaivāṇakai mukkokiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaran Imaiyattiruntenap porunti Uṭaṉiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟirunta maṅkaiyar tilatam tiyākapatākaip purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punitakuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuṭaiyāḷ Avan tiruviḷattu Aruḷumuḻutuṭaiyāḷena mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum cempon virasiṅṅāsanattu viṟṟirun=taru
ḷi kopparakecaripanmarāna tripuvanacakravattikaḷ śrī vikramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu Arumoḻideva vaḷanāṭṭup puliyur nāṭṭu brahmadeyam pulivalattup peruṅkuṟi mahā sabhaiyom Irājendracoḻa Attiyile kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu paṇip paṇiyāl paṇikka tiruvārur Uṭaiyār śrī mulasthāna muṭaiyārkku Āticaṇṭe śvaradevarkku Iṟaiyili
ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur kaṭuvāyāna rā[ja]nārāyaṇap perāṟṟu vaṭakarai tuṇṭappaṭṭa kaṟpūrakkuṭukkaiyenṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Itdevatānam karuṇākaranallūr Ellaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kaṭuvāyāna rāja nārāyaṇap perāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum melpār�Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.605 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
